articles.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo a global health emergency
articles.summary: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.

articles.summary: Ukraine's president says the strikes are a "justified" response to deadly Russian attacks on Ukrainian cities.
